rows.bounded_claim: Within the scope of this artefact at the named release tag, provides a single runnable entry point that exercises the minimal admissibility-before-effect demonstration.
Within the scope of this artefact at the named release tag, refuses state mutation in the absence of a valid DecisionRecord.
Within the scope of this artefact at the named release tag, treats prior decision receipts as inputs to the next admissibility decision.
Within the scope of this artefact at the named release tag, emits a refusal receipt at the point admissibility fails.
Within the scope of this artefact at the named release tag, produces no downstream effect in the absence of a valid admissibility decision.
